title: Pledgee's liability for loss or decay of thing pledged; reimbursement of expenses of preservation
doc_html:
Art. 3167. Pledgee not bound for pledgor's obligations

            In the absence of an assumption by the pledgee, the existence of a pledge does not impose upon the pledgee liability for the pledgor's acts or omissions, nor does it bind the pledgee to perform the pledgor's obligations.

            Acts 2014, No. 281, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
Art. 3167.  Pledgee not bound for pledgor's obligations
In the absence of an assumption by the pledgee, the existence of a pledge does not
impose upon the pledgee liability for the pledgor's acts or omissions, nor does it bind the
pledgee to perform the pledgor's obligations.
Acts 2014, No. 281, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
